title: Luxurious Grilled Saudi Arabian Lamb Kebabs
description: A fresh and molten Saudi Arabian dish featuring lamb kebabs, served with chilled butter and confit tomato, perfect for a brunch mood. This dish is whole30 friendly and served on a wooden board.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Grill the lamb kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
While the lamb is cooking, slice the confit tomatoes and chop the fresh parsley.
Serve the lamb kebabs on a wooden board with chilled butter, confit tomatoes, and chopped parsley.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
